overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in ancient Egyptian-style attire walking through a desert canyon environment. The character moves steadily through sandy terrain surrounded by rocky cliffs and sparse dry vegetation under clear morning skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert valley approaching canyon entrance

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through the wide desert valley toward the distant canyon entrance

entered.detail: large rocky mountain slope forming the left boundary of the desert valley
large rocky mountain slope forming the right boundary of the desert valley
narrow gap between mountains marking the entrance to the canyon passage
sandy ground surface with visible footprints and wind patterns
small rock formations and boulders scattered across the desert floor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide desert valley with expansive sky overhead. Rocky mountain slopes frame the left and right sides of the valley, while ahead lies the dark entrance to a narrow canyon passage. The ground is covered in sand with scattered rocks and sparse dry bushes.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow canyon corridor with steep rock walls

events.description: entering the narrow canyon corridor as rock walls close in on both sides

agents.ego_description: continuing through the narrowing canyon passage with high rock walls rising on both sides

entered.detail: narrow sandy path continuing deeper into the canyon system

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow canyon corridor where the rock walls rise steeply on both sides, creating a more enclosed space. The sky becomes partially obscured by the high canyon walls, casting subtle shadows on the sandy floor. The path continues winding ahead through the rocky terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character travels from an expansive desert valley into the depths of a narrow canyon. It begins in a wide open space under a vast sky, moving across sandy ground dotted with scattered rocks and sparse dry bushes between sloping mountain sides. As the character advances, the open landscape gradually tightens toward a dark entrance ahead. The scene then shifts into a confined corridor where steep rock walls rise sharply on both sides, partially obscuring the sky and casting subtle shadows across the winding sandy path.
